domain: Yakut/Sakha scapulimancy horse-bone (heat horse shoulder-blade over fire; read crack patterns on planes against sacred-manual rubric; Siberian shamanic divination)
specific_mechanism: Heat-stress diagnostic eval that applies a graded sequence of OOD prompt perturbations (paraphrase intensification, persona-injection ramps, lexical adversarial nudges, instruction-hierarchy clashes) at increasing strength, observes characteristic 'crack' patterns in model response (response-diff vectors compared to baseline), and matches the crack signature to a catalog of named fault classes (refusal-shift, sycophancy-spike, hallucination-onset, contradiction-cascade, jailbreak-yield).
llm_application: SAKHA-CRACK-EVAL: a graded-perturbation diagnostic eval framework. (1) Apply K-step perturbation ladder Π_1<Π_2<...<Π_K of escalating prompt stresses (e.g., increasing paraphrase distance, persona-injection magnitude, sycophancy bait, instruction-conflict intensity). (2) At each step record response-diff vector d_k = R(prompt+Π_k) - R(prompt). (3) Compute crack-pattern signature S = (d_1,...,d_K) → vector of magnitudes, angles, divergence indicators. (4) Match S against a sacred-manual catalog of named fault classes {refusal-shift, sycophancy-spike, hallucination-onset, contradiction-cascade, jailbreak-yield, instruction-collapse} via nearest-neighbor in signature space. Differs from LLM Visual Anomaly Detection 2404.09654 (zero-shot detection without crack-class catalog), Calibrated Feature Fusion (industrial defect, not LLM perturbation), MLLM Video Anomaly (visual), LLM Time-Series Anomaly (temporal). Differs from R359 ETRUSCAN-HARUSPEX (frozen K-zone rubric) and R418 SUTARTINES-EVAL (canon-dissonance pairing) by being CRACK-PATTERN signature matching against named fault catalog.
novelty_claim: LLM Anomaly Detection (visual, video, time-series) cover anomaly/perturbation diagnostic space. SAKHA-CRACK-EVAL adds GRADED PERTURBATION LADDER + CRACK-SIGNATURE MATCHING against NAMED FAULT-CLASS CATALOG. Recombination.
